extension.meta.name: LinkShield — Protection contre les liens frauduleux
extension.meta.description: Détection automatique des sites frauduleux et de l'hameçonnage. Langage simple, pour tous.
extension.popup.status_warning_subtitle: {{n}} liens sur cette page méritent un examen plus attentif
extension.popup.status_danger_subtitle: {{domain}} se fait passer pour un autre site afin de voler vos informations
extension.popup.action_trust: Toujours faire confiance à ce site
extension.popup.onboarding_tip: Je vérifie chaque lien de chaque page. Les dangereux sont marqués en rouge. Hésitation ? Clic droit → « Vérifier avec LinkShield ».
extension.popup.aha_found_scams: J'ai trouvé {{n}} liens frauduleux que votre navigateur a laissés passer
extension.popup.offline_warning: Hors ligne — protection de base active
extension.popup.recent_empty: Rien pour l'instant — naviguez normalement, je surveille.
extension.common.trust_footer: Vos données ne quittent jamais cet appareil
extension.block_page.title: STOP
extension.block_page.explanation: {{domain}} se fait passer pour un autre site afin de voler vos informations.
extension.block_page.brand_impersonation: Ce site se fait passer pour {{brand}}
extension.block_page.scheme_heading: Comment les escrocs utilisent ces sites :
extension.block_page.scheme_step1: On vous demandera votre mot de passe ou vos coordonnées bancaires
extension.block_page.scheme_step2: L'escroc vole tout ce que vous tapez
extension.block_page.scheme_step3: Il vide votre compte ou usurpe votre identité
extension.block_page.proceed_button: Je comprends le risque — ouvrir quand même
extension.block_page.trust_footer: Protégé par LinkShield. Vos données restent sur votre appareil.
extension.welcome.hero_subtitle: Chaque lien que vous voyez est vérifié. Les dangereux sont bloqués automatiquement.
extension.welcome.step1_desc: Chaque page, chaque lien. Badge vert : sûr. Rouge : arnaque.
extension.welcome.step2_desc: Nous ne vérifions que les noms de sites. Votre historique ne quitte jamais cet appareil.
extension.welcome.step3_desc: La plupart des vérifications se font sur votre appareil en moins d'une seconde.
extension.welcome.step4_desc: Protégez parents, enfants, grands-parents avec un seul plan. Modes différents pour chacun.
extension.welcome.cta_scan: Scanner ma boîte contre les arnaques cachées
extension.welcome.trust_footer: Le blocage est toujours gratuit. Vos données ne quittent jamais cet appareil.
landing.hero.subtitle: Vérification automatique des liens sur chaque page. 9 sources de menaces. Détection par IA. Vos données de navigation ne quittent jamais votre appareil.
landing.hero.cta_footer: Protection de base gratuite à vie. Sans carte.
landing.final_cta.title: Prêt à naviguer en sécurité ?
landing.final_cta.subtitle: Des milliers de personnes naviguent sans souci.
landing.language_switcher.label: Langue
landing.features.heading: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
landing.how_it_works.heading: How LinkShield protects you
landing.pricing_teaser.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
landing.pricing_teaser.trial_note: All plans include 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.
landing.pricing_teaser.free.name: Free
landing.pricing_teaser.personal.name: Personal
landing.pricing_teaser.family.name: Family
landing.comparison.heading: How we compare
landing.privacy.heading: Privacy is not a feature. It's the architecture.
landing.privacy.server_note: If breached: attacker gets emails + subscription. Boring.
landing.privacy.device_note: If device is lost: protected by OS encryption.
landing.testimonials.heading: What users say
landing.faq.heading: FAQ
email.common.trust_footer: LinkShield · Protection that stays on your device
email.common.footer_legal: You received this email because you have a LinkShield account.
email.welcome.subject: Welcome to LinkShield — you're protected now
email.welcome.preheader: Every link you see is being checked, automatically.
email.welcome.body_p1: We'll quietly check every link you encounter. The dangerous ones get a red mark — you'll see them before clicking. That's it.
email.welcome.body_p2: Your browsing data never leaves your device. We only check domain names, and your history is yours alone.
email.welcome.cta_scan: Scan my inbox for hidden scams
email.welcome.list_item_1: Automatic link checking on every page you visit
email.welcome.list_item_2: Block dangerous sites before they steal your data
email.welcome.list_item_3: Works across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and your phone
email.welcome.list_item_4: Your data stays on your device — always
email.receipt.subject: Your LinkShield receipt
email.receipt.title: Payment received — thank you
email.receipt.body_p1: Thanks for supporting LinkShield. Your subscription is active.
email.weekly_report.subject: Your week on LinkShield
email.weekly_report.preheader: See what we blocked this week.
email.weekly_report.title: This week, LinkShield protected you from:
email.weekly_report.body_p1: Here's what happened on your devices in the past 7 days.
email.weekly_report.percentile_body: You're safer than {{pct}}% of LinkShield users this week.
email.family_invite.subject: {{name}} invited you to join their LinkShield family
email.family_invite.preheader: Free protection on your devices, set up in 30 seconds.
email.family_invite.title: You've been invited to LinkShield Family
email.family_invite.body_p1: {{name}} added you to their LinkShield family plan. You get the same protection on up to 2 of your devices — for free.
email.family_invite.body_p2_security: This invitation is for you only — it expires in 72 hours. Your family admin can't see what you browse; only alerts when something dangerous is blocked on your device.
email.breach_alert.subject: Your email was found in a data breach
email.breach_alert.preheader: Change your password on affected sites soon.
email.breach_alert.title: Your email appeared in a new breach
email.breach_alert.body_p1: Your email was found in a recently disclosed data breach. This means your password on the affected site may be exposed.
email.breach_alert.body_p2_recommendatio: Change your password on that site now. If you use the same password elsewhere, change it there too. Consider a password manager — it's the only real fix.
email.subscription_cancel.subject: Your LinkShield subscription was canceled
email.subscription_cancel.title: We'll be here if you come back
email.subscription_cancel.body_p1: Your subscription has been canceled. Blocking scam sites continues to work for free — this is our ethical invariant, it won't change.
email.subscription_cancel.body_p2_keep_f: You'll keep your free-tier features: link scanning, block pages, email leak checks, and basic Privacy Audit grades.
email.granny_mode_invite.subject: {{name}} set up LinkShield protection for you
email.granny_mode_invite.preheader: Simple protection from scams — set up by your family.
email.granny_mode_invite.title: Safety from online scams — set up for you
email.granny_mode_invite.body_p1_to_gran: {{name}} set up LinkShield protection on your devices with extra-large text and voice alerts. You don't need to do anything — it's already working.
email.granny_mode_invite.body_p2_what_it: When a scammer tries to trick you with a fake bank website or delivery notice, LinkShield stops it before you enter anything. A clear warning shows in big letters: 'STOP — this is a scam site'.
email.granny_mode_invite.reassurance: If you're not sure what to do, tap the 'Ask family' button in the app — {{name}} gets a message and can help.
